# **Battlegrounds API**

# Concept

The battlegrounds API is a datapack tool for the booths connected to the Baobab Battlegrounds, aka the PVP arena of Smithed Summit 2026\. The following documentation is primarily for the relevant booths. 

# Misc information

* The storage entry `summit.battlegrounds:database session` contains data about the current session.  
* Players that are in the battlegrounds have the `summit.battlegrounds.player` tag.  
* To build custom battleground arenas, reference the example structure file located in the BSL distribution

![][image1]  
*Location for the example battleground arena structure file*

# Scoreboards

Scoreboards used to track the state of the battlegrounds and control flow.

| Scoreboard | Description  |
| :---- | :---- |
| `$players summit.battlegrounds`  | Displays the number of active players in the battlegrounds. |
| `$time_left summit.battlegrounds` | The number of seconds left until the next booth in the queue is activated. (\`-1\` when not ticking down) |
| `#block_player_enter summit.battlegrounds` | Can be set to \`1\` in conjunction with the \`\#summit.battlegrounds:api/player\_enter\_attempt\` function tag to block players from entering. |

# Function Tags

Function tags allow you to implement more custom logic within the battlegrounds. 

| Function Tag  | Description  |
| :---- | :---- |
| `#summit.battlegrounds:api/booth_active`  | Activates when a booth becomes active in the battlegrounds.  |
| `#summit.battlegrounds:api/booth_inactive`  | Activates when a booth becomes inactive in the battlegrounds.  |
| `#summit.battlegrounds:api/player_enter_attempt` | Activates when a player is attempting to enter the battlegrounds. |
| `#summit.battlegrounds:api/player_enter`  | Activates when a player enters the battlegrounds.  |
| `#summit.battlegrounds:api/player_leave`  | Activates when a player leaves the battlegrounds.  |
| `#summit.battlegrounds:api/player_died`  | Activates when a player died in the battlegrounds.  |

## Important note

When using these function tags, it is first required that you check to ensure your booth is active before doing anything. This can be done by adding `execute unless data storage summit.battlegrounds:database session{booth_id:'YOUR_BOOTH_ID_HERE'} run return 0` to the top of the function that is called from the function tag. Don't forget to update the `booth_id` so that it matches the ID of your booth. 

# Functions

## Register booth

Used to register a booth within the battlegrounds system. 

| Macro  | Type  | Description  |
| :---- | :---- | :---- |
| `booth_id` | string | The booth calling this function. |
| `booth_name` | string | The name of the booth to be displayed. |
| `return_pos` | position | Position to return player after session. |
| `return_rot` | rotation | Rotation to return player after session. |
| `struct_function` | function | A function that will call the `set_structure` API endpoint for overriding the battlegrounds structure. (must be a valid function even if its blank) |
| `compatibility` | string | An ID that when shared by booths, allows them to play together at the same time. |
| `kit_function` | function | A function that will give the player items for this default kit. (can also give a random kit but that is up to vendor for implementation) |

Ex: `function summit.battlegrounds:api/register_booth {booth_id:"blue_booth", booth_name:"Blue Booth", return_pos:"[43.48d, 148.00d, -82.29d]", return_rot:"[-243.08f, 1.67f]", struct_function:"summit.battlegrounds.example:blue/set_structure", compatibility:"blue_booth", kit_function:"summit.battlegrounds.example:blue/give_kit_d"}` 

| Return Value | Reason |
| ----- | ----- |
| 0 | One or more required macros are missing. |
| 1 | The booth has been successfully registered. |

## Assign kit

Used to assign a kit to the player when the booth is active, so that they get the correct items when entering the battlegrounds. 

| Macro | Type | Description |
| ----- | ----- | ----- |
| `booth_id` | string | The booth calling this function. |
| `kit_id` | string | An ID to uniquely identify the kit. |
| `kit_function` | function | A function that will give the player items for this kit. |

Ex: `execute as @p run function summit.battlegrounds:api/assign_kit {booth_id:"blue_booth", kit_id: "blue_booth:kit_1", kit_function:"summit.battlegrounds.example:blue/give_kit_1"}` 

| Return Value | Reason |
| ----- | ----- |
| \-1 | The booth is not currently active in the battlegrounds. |
| 0 | One or more required macros are missing. |
| 1 | The kit has been successfully assigned to the player. |

## Unassign kit

Used to remove an assigned kit from a player when the booth is active, so that they get the default kit instead.

Ex: `execute as @p run function summit.battlegrounds:api/unassign_kit`

| Return Value | Reason |
| ----- | ----- |
| 0 | Something has gone very wrong. |
| 1 | The assigned kit has been successfully removed from the player. |

## Set Structure

Will place the specified structure inside the battlegrounds if the booth is currently active. 

| Macro | Type | Description |
| ----- | ----- | ----- |
| `booth_id` | string | The booth calling this function. |
| `structure` | string | The structure file to place in the battlegrounds. |

Ex: `function summit.battlegrounds:api/set_structure {booth_id:"red_booth",structure:"red_booth:arena_1"}` 

| Return Value | Reason |
| ----- | ----- |
| \-1 | The booth is not currently active in the battlegrounds. |
| 0 | One or more required macros are missing. |
| 1 | The structure has been successfully placed. |

[image1]: <data:image/png;base64,>
